evals.prompt: Create a new Serverless project for the Citizens Bank demo.
evals.expected_output: citizens-bank/.env with DEPLOYMENT_TYPE=serverless, ELASTICSEARCH_URL, KIBANA_URL, ES_API_KEY. citizens-bank-provision-log.md confirming green health. .env.example written alongside.
assertions: .env written to workspace with all required fields populated
INDEX_PREFIX is blank (isolated cluster, no prefix needed)
Provision log confirms connectivity verified with cluster health status

evals.prompt: I want to run the IHG Club demo on the same cluster I used for Citizens Bank. Copy the env and set up the namespace.
evals.expected_output: ihg-club/.env copied from citizens-bank/.env with DEMO_SLUG=ihg-club, ENGAGEMENT updated, INDEX_PREFIX=ihg-. No new cluster provisioned. Connectivity re-verified against existing cluster.
assertions: No new cluster provisioned — reuses existing credentials
DEMO_SLUG updated to ihg-club in the new .env
ENGAGEMENT updated to IHG Club Vacations
Connectivity verified against the copied cluster URL
Provision log notes this is a namespace copy, not a new provisioning
